with.translate: с, вместе с, от, несмотря на, напихать
mnemonic: with [(ув)и'(вз)] вместе, с - (Увиз-ите) его с вещами.

examples.eng: Leave the child with me!
Great Britain fought with France.
Off to bed with you!
examples.ru: А ну давай живо в кровать!

examples.eng: I hope you're not angry with me.
examples.ru: Надеюсь, ты на меня не сердишься.

examples.eng: It is different with me.
Down with school!
She stood with her back to me.
He was concerned with English.
Be careful with that glass.
She had her husband with her.
Fill the bowl with sugar.
Britain's trade with Japan
Put this bag with the others.
With all his faults, I still like him.
examples.ru: При всех недостатках, он всё равно мне нравится.

examples.eng: I used to play chess with him.
examples.ru: Когда-то я играл с ним в шахматы.

examples.eng: We need someone with new ideas.
examples.ru: Нам нужен человек с новыми идеями.

examples.eng: I was too weak with hunger to cry.
examples.ru: Я слишком ослаб от голода, чтобы плакать.

examples.eng: You're either with me or against me.
examples.ru: Ты либо со мной, либо против меня.

examples.eng: We sailed with the wind.
What will you buy with the money?
examples.ru: Что ты купишь на эти деньги?

examples.eng: The pressure varies with the depth.
examples.ru: Давление меняется в зависимости от глубины.

examples.eng: We lay in bed with the window open.
examples.ru: Мы лежали в постели, с открытым окном.

examples.eng: I saw Bob in town with his girlfriend.
examples.ru: В городе я видел Боба с его подругой /девушкой/.

examples.eng: He prepared everything with great care.
I amused myself with crossword puzzles.
They were trembling with fear.
Her boots were covered with mud.
I left your keys with the janitor.
Stop fighting with your brother!
She's delighted with her new car.
examples.ru: Она в восторге от своего нового автомобиля.
